proofs.control: Scoring is deterministic for identical inputs

evidence.domain_purity: packages/domain is pure — no I/O, no DB, no HTTP, no env reads (CLAUDE.md invariant 7)
evidence.no_time_dependency: Scoring functions take explicit inputs, never read Date.now()
evidence.replay_support: Promotion evaluation supports deterministic replay via snapshots (promotion.ts replayPromotion())

proofs.notes: Domain package is pure by design (invariant 7). validateWeightsV2 produces identical output on repeated calls. 50 pick candidates sampled with 3 distinct scores. Promotion supports deterministic replay.

scoring_components.promotion: 5-input weighted sum: edge, trust, readiness, uniqueness, boardFit
scoring_components.model: 30 core weights + 6 enhanced features, all named
scoring_components.tiers: S/A/B/C/D tier with explicit minScore/minEdge/maxRisk thresholds

evidence.audit_trail: Every promotion decision logs scores + policy + qualification reason in audit_log
explanation_surfaces: promotion-service.ts — logs all 5 scores in audit payload
model-registry.ts — named policy with minimumScore + boardCaps
band-evaluation.ts — band assignment with edge/uncertainty thresholds
domain-analysis-service.ts — enriches picks with named signals

proofs.notes: Scoring uses named components (edge, trust, readiness, uniqueness, boardFit) with explicit weights. 30 core + 6 enhanced features all have named keys. Every promotion decision is audited with full score breakdown. Band assignment uses explicit thresholds.

proofs.control: Scoring changes are versioned or tracked

sport_versions.description: NBA basketball optimized for player props with rest, pace, and matchup focus
MLB baseball optimized for handedness splits, weather, and bullpen analysis
NFL football optimized for weather impact, injuries, and situational factors
NHL hockey optimized for goaltending, special teams, and game flow

evidence.version_field: SportSpecificWeights.version — string version per sport config
evidence.last_updated_field: SportSpecificWeights.lastUpdated — ISO date of last change
evidence.tracking_mechanism: Version strings in code + git history for weight changes
evidence.validation: validateWeightsV2() checks all weights are present and non-negative

proofs.notes: All 4 sport configs carry version + lastUpdated: NBA=1.0.0, MLB=1.0.0, NFL=1.0.0, NHL=1.0.0. Changes tracked via version field + git history.

proofs.control: All scoring features are explicitly defined

evidence.enumeration: CORE_WEIGHT_KEYS (30) + ENHANCED_FEATURE_KEYS (6) + TIME_WEIGHT_KEYS (5) — all explicitly listed in types.ts

proofs.notes: 41 scoring features explicitly defined: 30 core weights, 6 enhanced features, 5 time weights. All enumerated in types.ts. Validation passes for all 4 sports: NBA=VALID, MLB=VALID, NFL=VALID, NHL=VALID.
